features.name: concatenation wrapper in module port connection with signedness mismatch
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with port connections using concatenation braces around signals, where the connected signal has signed type but the port expects unsigned or vice versa
features.snippet:
module top; reg signed [3:0] s; flip_mod fm(.inp({s}), .out({o})); endmodule
module flip_mod(input [3:0] inp, output [3:0] out); assign out = ~inp; endmodule

features.name: signed variable in concatenation passed to unsigned port
features.description: Code should include a signed variable wrapped in concatenation braces being connected to an unsigned input port in module instantiation
features.snippet:
reg signed [3:0] inp; wire [3:0] out; flip_mod fm(.inp({inp}), .out({out}));
module flip_mod(input [3:0] inp, output [3:0] out); assign out = ~inp; endmodule

features.name: concatenation with $unsigned conversion in port connection
features.description: Code should include a module port connection using $unsigned() conversion wrapped in concatenation braces to explicitly convert signed signal to unsigned
